title: Mentor Guide — Day 5: Commitment
coachingObjective: Create clarity and commitment. Complete Week 1 coaching summary.

timing.preSession: 15 min — review presentation order and rubric
timing.postSession: 30 min — complete Week 1 coaching summary for each participant

discussionQuestions: Who do you want to help?
What would success look like in three years?
coachingTips: End with accountability: one action before next session
Complete Week 1 coaching summary in app
warningSigns: Vague vision with no measurable outcome
reflectionPrompts: What is one commitment you will keep this week?

activityCoachingNotes.note: Note one strength and one gap per participant for summary.
Record exact commitment language participant uses aloud.
